UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: User profile document containing basic user metadata.

uid.description: The unique ID of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

displayName.description: The display name of the user.

photoURL.description: The profile photo URL of the user.

lastLoginAt.description: Timestamp of the last login event.

marketPresence.description: The presence status of the user.

method.description: Which verification method was used to certify this user.

forumUrl.description: The official Warframe Forum profile URL of the user, if verified via forums.

MarketListing.title: MarketListing
MarketListing.description: A live trade listing on the Warframe Prime junk and part market.

normalizedSellerIGN.description: Lowercased verified in-game name for comparisons.

isSellerVerified.description: Whether the seller is fully verified.

sellerVerificationMethod.description: The certified verification path used by the seller.

itemName.description: The name of the Prime piece/set (e.g. Bronze Junk, Sellsheet item).

type.description: Whether listing is WTS (Want to sell) or WTB (Want to buy).

createdAt.description: Raw server timestamp of listing creation.

SavedItemEntry.title: SavedItemEntry
SavedItemEntry.description: A saved calculation inventory state representing counts of rare, uncommon or common prime items.

name.description: Dynamic or custom name of the save.

timestamp.description: User visible date string for display.

totalItems.description: Total count of prime items in the batch.

createdAt.description: Raw server timestamp of the save.

/users/{userId}.description: Reference profile document for each registered user.

/users/{userId}/savedItems/{itemId}.description: Cached collections of saved prime calculator batches.

/listings/{listingId}.description: Active or completed trading listings on the live market.
